rules.cond: f28 > 0.50 AND f12 > 0.30 AND f24 BETWEEN 0.20 AND 1.20 AND f49 > 0.30
rules.label: MACD bullish crossover above SMA20, RSI in healthy zone, positive market correlation

rules.cond: f40 > 0.40 AND f39 > 0.30 AND f49 > 0.20 AND f30 BETWEEN -0.50 AND 0.50
rules.label: Market momentum strong (10/20d), regime aligned, moderate volatility

rules.cond: f2 > 0.50 AND f12 > 0.40 AND f28 > 0.30 AND f32 BETWEEN -0.20 AND 0.50
rules.label: New highs above SMA20 with bullish MACD and bounded ATR
Close breaks SMA20+EMA26, MACD signal positive

rules.cond: f24 BETWEEN 0.0 AND 1.0 AND f28 > 0.10 AND f49 BETWEEN -0.20 AND 0.80
rules.label: RSI bullish but not overbought, mild MACD positive, normal correlation

rules.cond: f28 > 0.0 AND f40 > 0.10 AND f30 BETWEEN -0.30 AND 0.40
rules.label: Mild bullish MACD with positive market trend, BB normal

rules.cond: f12 > 0.10 AND f4 > 0.10 AND f32 BETWEEN -0.30 AND 0.40
rules.label: Price above 20d trend, ATR-percentage normal
MACD turning down, ATR spike, BB expansion, high beta to market
Market downtrend + volatility expansion across all proxies
RSI overbought + MACD turning down + ATR rising → reversal
Price collapse below 20d trend with bearish MACD

rules.cond: f45 BETWEEN -0.50 AND 0.50 AND f40 > 0.0 AND f49 BETWEEN -0.20 AND 0.80
rules.label: Rates stable, market mildly up, normal beta regime
